scripts.workspace:create: cd terraform && terraform workspace new dev && terraform workspace new prod
scripts.deploy:infrastructure:dev: cd terraform && terraform workspace select dev && terraform apply -var-file="terraform-dev.tfvars" -auto-approve
scripts.deploy:infrastructure:prod: cd terraform && terraform workspace select prod && terraform apply -var-file="terraform-prod.tfvars" -auto-approve
scripts._docker:build: cd app && docker buildx build --platform linux/arm64 --load -t red-alerts-api .
scripts.deploy:docker:dev: npm run _docker:build && npm run _docker:tag:dev && npm run _docker:push:dev && npm run _ecs:update:dev
scripts.deploy:docker:prod: npm run _docker:build && npm run _docker:tag:prod && npm run _docker:push:prod && npm run _ecs:update:prod
scripts.docker:login:dev: dotenv -e .env cross-env-shell "aws ecr get-login-password --region $AWS_REGION | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $AWS_ACCOUNT_ID.dkr.ecr.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com"
scripts.docker:login:prod: dotenv -e .env cross-env-shell "aws ecr get-login-password --region $AWS_REGION | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $AWS_ACCOUNT_ID.dkr.ecr.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com"
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run deploy:infrastructure:dev && npm run deploy:docker:dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run deploy:infrastructure:prod && npm run deploy:docker:prod
scripts.update:pip: cd app && python -m pip install --upgrade pip
